seoTitle: Daleys Point vs Dalgety — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Daleys Point and Dalgety. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Daleys Point vs Dalgety: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Daleys Point and Dalgety.
heading: Daleys Point vs Dalgety — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Daleys Point, New South Wales and Dalgety, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Daleys Point has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Dalgety (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Daleys Point or Dalgety safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Daleys Point has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Dalgety scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Daleys Point scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Dalgety scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Daleys Point or Dalgety?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Daleys Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
